project.name: IKE Pipeline
project.description: Reactor root and build infrastructure for the IKE Community. Provides the AsciiDoc documentation pipeline (6 PDF renderers), Java 25 compiler/test configuration, GPG signing, and shared plugin management. External projects inherit ike-parent (build conventions + BOM) or import ike-bom (dependency versions only).

requireMavenVersion.message: IKE projects require Maven 4+. Download: https://maven.apache.org/download.cgi

requireJavaVersion.message: IKE projects require Java 21+ (JRuby 10 baseline). macOS: brew install openjdk Ubuntu: sudo apt install openjdk-21-jdk
